message:
chore(messaging): suppress clippy lints on FABRIC stub async methods and large error types

Add #[allow(clippy::unused_async)] to stub async methods in Fabric
(connect, publish, subscribe, stream) and FabricSubscription::next
that currently use synchronous stubs but will gain real async bodies
in Phase 1. Add #[allow(clippy::result_large_err)] to
SubjectPattern::validate_non_overlapping and NormalizationPolicy::normalize
where the FabricError variant is intentionally rich.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
